description_long: This is a metallic fire hydrant with a glossy, reddish-brown finish, featuring a domed top and a cylindrical body. The hydrant has three prominent hose connection outlets: one on the front, and one on each side, all capped with hexagonal nuts. The top of the hydrant is adorned with a central operating nut, surrounded by a bolted flange, and the base is similarly flanged and bolted for secure mounting. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible manufacturer markings or attached chains. The overall design is robust, intended for high-pressure water delivery in emergency situations, and is typical of those found on urban streets and sidewalks.
description: A glossy, reddish-brown metallic fire hydrant with three capped hose outlets and a domed top, featuring bolted flanges and a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central hose outlet and the domed top with the operating nut clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the side hose outlets and the cylindrical body, with the front outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both side hose outlets symmetrically, with the central outlet not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side hose outlet and the cylindrical body, with the front outlet partially visible.
